description: Style NoteHitting all the season's fashion notes right, this pair of sandals from catwalk is a closet essential that'll go with all your summer favourites. You can wear this to snazz up a simple look, but don't forget to style them with tonal accessories!Heel: 1.5"Product DetailsBlunt toed mini-wedge sandal with forefoot strap and an ankle loop (also has a heel cup)Has a zipper at the heel collarBead embellishments all around the ankle loopTPU outsole with patterned groovesMaterial and CareSyntheticDo not machine wash or store in direct sunlightRemove dust with a dry clean cloth
